text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm oddly excited.
We decide to drop by the track in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The track conditions are exactly as you said.
There don't seem to be any problems.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Narita Brian! Good luck in today's race!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You're going to need it if Rice Shower is serious!
You can't let your guard down around the
Assassin!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
She even defeated my precious McQueen... So
you better be careful if you don't want to lose!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Well, that was a weird way to show support.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it. I'm not weak enough for
that to bother me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... How far are you planning on walking with
me? Hurry up and get to the stands or the staff
seating—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You can do this, Rice... Believe in yourself...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So you're Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes, I'm fine. Please, don't worry about me...

She says that, but her knees are trembling so
badly she's barely staying on her feet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sorry about that. Here, give me your hand.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Please don't come any closer! If you do,
misfortune will surely befall you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Bad things happen when I'm around. Everyone
else thinks so too, so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sorry for causing you trouble. I'm completely fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Even though your knees are still shaking?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
When someone wins, someone else loses.
Everybody is someone else's enemy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The thought of hurting someone else just by
existing is... scary, sad, and really awful. But...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I don't want to give up on running...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because there are people that my running brings
joy to!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Assassin is a title given to those who know the
weight of their duty.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There aren't many people with that kind of steel
in their spines... So I'm gonna put all my soul into
this too.
